requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 61000 Series and IEC 62920 Evidence for Mozambique PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——莫桑比克光伏逆变器的IEC 61000系列和IEC 62920证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——莫三比克光伏逆變器的IEC 61000系列和IEC 62920證據

summary.en: Mozambique PV inverter EMC evidence should be prepared on an IEC-referenced basis for INNOQ conformity/import review, EDM grid-connected project review, and lender or owner-engineer specifications. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment, while IEC 61000-series standards are commonly used for emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, and installation-level compatibility requirements. Where a solar project is financed by a development bank or donor, the lender technical schedule may require IEC EMC reports even when local import documentation is less explicit.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克光伏逆变器EMC证据应按IEC引用基础准备，以支持INNOQ合格评定/进口审核、EDM并网项目审查，以及贷款方或业主工程师规格。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列标准则通常用于发射、抗扰度、谐波、闪烁和安装层面兼容性要求。若太阳能项目由开发银行或捐助方融资，即使本地进口文件表述不够明确，贷款方技术清单也可能要求IEC EMC报告。
summary.zht: 莫三比克光伏逆變器EMC證據應按IEC引用基礎準備，以支持INNOQ合格評定/進口審核、EDM併網項目審查，以及貸款方或業主工程師規格。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列標準則通常用於發射、抗擾度、諧波、閃爍和安裝層面相容性要求。若太陽能項目由開發銀行或捐助方融資，即使本地進口文件表述不夠明確，貸款方技術清單也可能要求IEC EMC報告。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility standards for emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, and power-quality interfaces
INNOQ conformity/import review and project-specific EDM, lender, or owner-engineer specifications

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC documentation is commonly tied to GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and related domestic laboratory reports. These documents can help explain the product design, but the limits, test configuration, reporting format, and acceptance route may differ from IEC 62920 or the IEC 61000-series package requested by INNOQ, EDM, project owners, or lenders in Mozambique.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC文件通常与GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及相关国内实验室报告相关。这些文件可用于说明产品设计，但其限值、测试配置、报告格式和接受路径可能不同于莫桑比克INNOQ、EDM、项目业主或贷款方要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列证据包。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC文件通常與GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及相關國內實驗室報告相關。這些文件可用於說明產品設計，但其限值、測試配置、報告格式和接受路徑可能不同於莫三比克INNOQ、EDM、項目業主或貸款方要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列證據包。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related technical requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese EMC reports should be mapped line by line against IEC 62920 and the applicable IEC 61000-series tests before being used in Mozambique. Exporters should obtain or refresh IEC EMC type-test reports for the exact inverter model, power rating, firmware, and configuration, and should confirm whether testing at Mozambique-relevant 220/380 V, 50 Hz conditions is needed for the EDM or lender submission.
gap.zh: 中国EMC报告在用于莫桑比克前，应逐项映射至IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列测试。出口商应取得或更新准确逆变器型号、功率等级、固件和配置的IEC EMC型式试验报告，并确认EDM或贷款方提交是否需要在与莫桑比克相关的220/380 V、50 Hz条件下测试。
gap.zht: 中國EMC報告在用於莫三比克前，應逐項映射至IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列測試。出口商應取得或更新準確逆變器型號、功率等級、韌體和配置的IEC EMC型式試驗報告，並確認EDM或貸款方提交是否需要在與莫三比克相關的220/380 V、50 Hz條件下測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where INNOQ conformity/import review, EDM project review, or project-owner/lender specifications call for IEC EMC evidence; otherwise confirm case-by-case with the importer and competent authority
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic EMC testing under GB/T or NB/T standards is not automatic IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-series acceptance for Mozambique

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Mozambique PV inverter projects, prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series EMC evidence instead of relying on China-only GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 EMC summaries. Confirm with INNOQ, EDM, the importer, and any lender engineer whether the model requires fresh EMC testing under 220/380 V, 50 Hz project conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对莫桑比克光伏逆变器项目，应准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列EMC证据，而非依赖仅限中国的GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004 EMC摘要。请与INNOQ、EDM、进口商及任何贷款方工程师确认该型号是否需要在220/380 V、50 Hz项目条件下重新进行EMC测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對莫三比克光伏逆變器項目，應準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列EMC證據，而非依賴僅限中國的GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004 EMC摘要。請與INNOQ、EDM、進口商及任何貸款方工程師確認該型號是否需要在220/380 V、50 Hz項目條件下重新進行EMC測試。
